description: The HR leadership team needs the quarterly turnover report, including voluntary and involuntary separations.

nodes.task_description: Define the date range for the previous quarter.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst sets the report parameters for the correct date range.

nodes.task_description: Run a report from the HRIS on all employee terminations within that date range, categorized by reason.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst successfully generates the raw data.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the quarterly turnover rate and create a presentation summarizing the findings.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst calculates the rate and creates charts visualizing the data for leadership.
